installConfigs.instructions: Remote Asana MCP server. No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Asana workspace via OAuth, then stores the resulting token automatically. Provides tools to manage Asana tasks, projects, and workspaces.

Remote Asana MCP server. No API key is required: on first connection Theia opens a browser to authorize access to your Asana workspace via OAuth, then stores the resulting token automatically. Provides tools to manage Asana tasks, projects, and workspaces.
